title: Acceptance completeness gap report (Δ-19 / Track 2 Phase 2-β — ADVISORY, from facts only)
description: Engine-DERIVED, advisory artifact emitted by milestone-close Acceptance (driver._run_acceptance). It enumerates the COMPLETENESS gap = requirement ids that are bound to fresh-signed campaign-plan covers_req_ids (the human-signed F1 envelope, archive/2026-06-23-requirement-ledger-design.md §3.3.1) AND not yet delivered/waived. Generated ONLY from coverage/ledger FACTS — the §3.5.1-derived delivery_status of signed covers_req_ids (scope_report.compute_requirement_coverage), NEVER from the Acceptance verdict's pass/fail clause semantics: this SOURCE separation is the completeness<->quality SEAL the GATED §1.7-F path relies on. Phase 2-β is ADDITIVE + ADVISORY: nothing acts on this automatically (no auto-routing, no ship/route authority — that is the gated Phase 2-γ). Absent ledger ⇒ no gap report (byte-identical to today).

campaign_id.description: The campaign this gap report was computed for.

goal.description: Campaign goal (copied from the plan for a readable artifact).

source.description: Provenance SEAL: the gap is a pure projection of scope_report.compute_requirement_coverage (coverage/ledger facts), never the Acceptance verdict's quality judgment.

advisory.description: Phase 2-β: advisory only — nothing acts on this automatically. Auto-routing is the gated Phase 2-γ (§1.7-F).

ledger_present.description: True when a valid requirement ledger drove this projection.

signoff_status.description: campaign_plan_signoff status at computation time (design §3.3.1). The gap counts a REQ as in-envelope only when its covering milestone is fresh-signed.

gap.description: The signed-but-undelivered REQs (in-envelope completion candidates): each REQ bound to a fresh-signed covers_req_ids whose derived delivery_status is not delivered/waived.

req_id.description: The ledger requirement id (covered by a signed milestone, not yet delivered).

delivery_status.description: The §3.5.1-derived delivery_status (a gap item is undelivered: not_started/in_progress).

covered_by.description: The signed campaign-plan milestone id whose covers_req_ids names this REQ.

uncovered_requirements.description: REQs in the ledger covered by NO fresh-signed milestone (the PRD gap). NOT part of the in-envelope §1.7-F gap (never signed into a milestone) — reported separately as context only.
